calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Deposit Of Funds
Off Calendar Apr-07-2015 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-03-2015 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Aug-26-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary Lin for Helen Jump.

Ms. Lin stated that it is difficult to locate records on the gun purchases, that the cars were sold, that she was hoping the guns could be confirmed to her Client, that the guns were purchased during the marriage and that the best they could do is to provide a declaration under penalty of perjury. The Court granted the Petition for Spousal Property but stated that it will most likely carve out the issue of the guns (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
